modmenu.descriptionTranslation.elytra_op:
Keys: H toggles Elytra Optima, J cycles strategies.
GitHub: https://github.com/hzyhhzy/elytra-strategy-lab
Pitch-only Elytra strategy mod using optimized flight profiles: start +0, start +2, initial-speed no-drop, height +1, smooth climb, jittery climb, and fastest horizontal strategies.
